function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"scenarios": [{"title": "Sub returns 2 when called with 5 and 3", "given": "the math package is imported", "when": "Sub(5, 3) is invoked", "then": ["the return value is 2", "no panic or error occurs"], "tags": ["@unit"]}, {"title": "Sub handles negative differences", "given": "the math package is imported", "when": "Sub(3, 5) is invoked", "then": ["the return value is -2"], "tags": ["@unit"]}]}
